citation.description: Ticket comment (AC1) by Joe Oakhart records full replay output: 'corpus: 1016 sidecars / 264 tickets / 23877 findings; skipped remainder: 1052 sidecars (different_version=217, untagged=835, unparseable=0)'. Script extended at docs/experiments/calibrate_plan_review_thresholds.py lines 34-108 with skipped counter tracking different_version/untagged/unparseable and printing same in main().

criteria.criterion: A comment on this ticket records the segmented replay's full output including the segment's sidecar/ticket/finding counts AND the skipped-remainder counts by reason (different-version vs untagged), produced by the extended script.

citation.description: Ticket comment (AC2) records adjudication for all 11 currently-blocking criteria (T5e DEMOTE, T8/G1G2/G6/E4/E2/T1/F1/COH/T4/G5 KEEP), each citing (n, validity, rev_rr, p90, fire) and applying the pre-registered decision rule. Non-blocking criteria handled (no promotions, T5d LOW-DATA, T7/F4/ISF FP-PRONE already advisory).

criteria.criterion: A comment on this ticket records the adjudication: every non-DET blocking-tier criterion mapped from current threshold to a KEEP/RAISE/LOWER/DEMOTE decision via the decision rule above, each citing its replay row signals.

citation.description: Ticket comment (AC3 LANDING EVIDENCE) attests Gerrit change 714 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/714) MERGED with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1. Codebase confirms: (1) skipped-counter present in calibrate_plan_review_thresholds.py lines 34-108; (2) 'Calibration 3' section present in docs/experiments/plan-review-threshold-calibration.md lines 78-138; (3) T5e demotion applied in src/rebar/llm/plan_review/criteria_routing.json lines 386-411 (default_posture=advisory, block_threshold=0.95).

criteria.criterion: The Gerrit change containing the script skipped-counter and the 'Calibration 3' section of docs/experiments/plan-review-threshold-calibration.md (plus criteria_routing.json threshold edits iff the adjudication warrants any; the no-change case is stated explicitly in that doc section) is MERGED (LLM-Review +1, Verified +1).

citation.description: Story 7d91-55fc-e07c-4101 (large-sleepful-needlefish) has a comment 'CALIBRATION-3 FLOOR-ATTRIBUTION EVIDENCE' recording: 807/2271 = 35.5% floor-driven overall; ac_unverifiable 395/807 = 48.9%; oracle-kind classification of seed-42 sample of 100 floor-driven ac_unverifiable findings: underspecified_oracle 56/100, missing_oracle 7/100, ambiguous 37/100. Sample-size rule stated (seed-42 sample of 100).

criteria.criterion: A comment on story 7d91-55fc-e07c-4101 records the floor-attribution analysis: floor-driven block count/share (overall and ac_unverifiable-specific) and the missing_oracle/underspecified_oracle/ambiguous proportions with the sample-size rule stated above.
